texto: What, everyone you know has been kidnapped by pirates and forced to chop octopus in a kitchen that smells like a whale's stomach?""Quite a lot of them, yes," said Trudi, who appeared to be one of those people who'd heard of sarcasm but thought it was some sort of exotic fruit like a pineapple.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Claire Fayers: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “What, everyone you know has been kidnapped by pirates and forced to chop octopus in a kitchen tha…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, food, pirates pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e pirates.

texto: They say there are three kinds of people in the world: those who listen to stories, those who tell them, and those who make them.
